backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining a ChatMessage type and two endpoints: a query to fetch messages since a given timestamp, and a shared function to post new messages, keeping a rolling buffer of 500.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented features with their target files, component dependencies, test IDs, and confidence levels for the GlobalChat frontend auth, routing, and chat functionality.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source file paths to short human-readable summaries describing each component's purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, radius, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Vite/React app titled 'GlobalChat', sets a dark background color (#1e1f22) and mounts the React root at #root.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that synchronously reads a localStorage session on mount, conditionally renders LandingPage or ChatPage, and wraps both in an ErrorBoundary with a reload-on-error fallback.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin panel UI for the owner (AI.Caffeine) with tabbed moderation controls including ban, unban, mute, unmute, slow mode, big messages, forced messages, and additional server management commands broadcast via BroadcastChannel.
frontend/src/components/AIChatButton.tsx: Empty file placeholder for the floating AI Chat toggle button component.
frontend/src/components/AIChatPanel.tsx: Empty file placeholder for the AI chat panel component.
Empty file placeholder for the birthday overlay component.
frontend/src/components/ChatArea.tsx: Scrollable chat message area with Discord-style theming that renders pinned messages, MOTD banners, highlighted users, system/big/forced messages, and listens to BroadcastChannel events for real-time UI updates.
frontend/src/components/ConfettiBurst.ts: Renders an animated confetti burst overlay with 80 randomly colored/sized particles falling from the top, then calls onDone after 3 seconds.
frontend/src/components/ConfirmationToas: Displays a fixed toast notification with a confirm/dismiss action for destructive operations, auto-dismissing after 5 seconds.
A textarea-based message input bar that enforces mute, ban, slow mode, chat lock, and shadowban rules before calling onSend, with an emoji picker toggle button.
frontend/src/components/MOTDBanner.tsx: Renders a dismissible message-of-the-day banner with a megaphone icon and blue styling.
frontend/src/components/OwnerShutdownBan: Shows a red banner indicating the server is shut down with a live countdown and a 'Start Up Now' button for the owner.
frontend/src/components/PinnedMessageBar: Displays a pinned message bar showing the pinned message's author and text, with an unpin button visible only to the owner.
frontend/src/components/SecretEmojiPicke: A hidden emoji picker panel with 80 curated emojis, toggled via Ctrl+Alt and closeable via Escape or clicking outside.
Full-screen overlay displayed during server shutdown, showing a message and live countdown timer.
frontend/src/components/Sidebar.tsx: Discord-style sidebar showing text/voice channels and a list of online users with avatars, owner badges, and a logout button.
frontend/src/components/StartupOverlay.t: Full-screen overlay shown while the server is starting up, auto-dismissing after 5 seconds via onDone callback.
frontend/src/components/TopBar.tsx: Top navigation bar displaying the channel name, online count, an admin panel button (owner only), and a logout button.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
Detects `@G.ai <question>` mentions in chat messages and sends an AI-generated response via OpenAI as a bot message.
frontend/src/hooks/useBanManager.ts: Manages user bans stored in localStorage, providing callbacks to ban, unban, check ban status, and retrieve remaining ban duration.
Polls the ICP backend for new chat messages, merges them with local state using fingerprint-based deduplication, and persists messages to localStorage as a cache.
frontend/src/hooks/useChatLock.ts: Tracks a chat lock state stored in localStorage and updated via BroadcastChannel, exposing a per-user check that exempts the AI.Caffeine user.
frontend/src/hooks/useChatModeration.ts: Automatically moderates incoming chat messages using OpenAI, banning users and sending a warning bot message when disrespectful content is detected.
Handles a Ctrl+C keyboard shortcut (when no text is selected) to show a confirmation toast, then clears chat messages if the user presses C within 5 seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useEmojiPickerShortcu: Toggles an emoji picker visibility state when Ctrl+Alt is pressed.
frontend/src/hooks/useHighlights.ts: Reads user highlight color mappings from localStorage and listens for BroadcastChannel updates, exposing a lookup function for a given username.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout functionality, session persistence via AuthClient, and status tracking exposed through a React context and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useMOTD.ts: Manages a Message of the Day stored in localStorage, listening for BroadcastChannel set/clear events and providing a dismiss callback.
frontend/src/hooks/useMuteManager.ts: React hook that manages per-user mute entries stored in localStorage, supporting mute/unmute operations, expiry pruning, and cross-tab sync via BroadcastChannel.
frontend/src/hooks/usePinnedMessages.ts: React hook that reads and syncs a single pinned chat message from localStorage, updating state via BroadcastChannel pin/unpin events.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder file kept for template compatibility; exports nothing and defers all data management to useBroadcastMessages.
frontend/src/hooks/useServerState.ts: React hook that tracks server shutdown/startup state from localStorage, auto-restores after a timed shutdown, and syncs across tabs via BroadcastChannel.
frontend/src/hooks/useShadowban.ts: React hook that reads a list of shadowbanned usernames from localStorage and listens for BroadcastChannel updates to keep the list current.
frontend/src/hooks/useSlowMode.ts: React hook that manages slow-mode state (enabled flag and cooldown seconds) from BroadcastChannel events and tracks per-user last-message timestamps to enforce cooldowns.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter font, configures Tailwind with light/dark CSS custom properties, and defines custom animations (slide-in, rainbow, shake, confetti, birthday pop, fade-in) and Discord-style scrollbars.
frontend/src/lib/adminState.ts: Utility module providing typed get/set/remove helpers for all admin-related localStorage keys (pinned message, highlights, shadowbans, slow mode, lock, MOTD, theme).
frontend/src/lib/auth.ts: Authentication utility that handles user registration, login, and session persistence in localStorage using btoa-encoded passwords, and seeds a hardcoded owner account on module load.
frontend/src/lib/broadcastControl.ts: Wraps the BroadcastChannel API with try/catch guards, providing subscribe, unsubscribe, and broadcastEvent helpers for cross-tab event messaging on the 'globalchat_control' channel.
frontend/src/lib/caffeineAI.ts: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/lib/exportChatLog.ts: Reads chat messages from localStorage and triggers a JSON file download of the chat log.
frontend/src/lib/modLog.ts: Manages a moderation log in localStorage, supporting get, add, and clear operations with a maximum of 100 entries.
frontend/src/lib/openai.ts: Provides utilities to store/retrieve an OpenAI API key, send chat completion requests to GPT-4o-mini, and moderate messages for disrespectful content.
frontend/src/lib/serverState.ts: Manages server shutdown/startup state via localStorage, with helpers to set, read, and format countdown timers for timed shutdowns capped at 50 minutes.
frontend/src/lib/userBadges.tsx: Defines a verified owner check for the username 'AI.Caffeine' and renders a crown badge with a tooltip for that user.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/ChatPage.tsx: Main chat page component that composes the chat UI (sidebar, messages, input, admin panel, overlays) and manages online users, channel naming, server state, and moderation hooks.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Authentication page with login and account creation modes, validating credentials via auth helpers and saving a session before navigating to the chat.
frontend/src/types/chat.ts: Defines the ChatMessage TypeScript interface used throughout the application.
frontend/src/utils/sampleMessages.ts: Generates and seeds sample chat messages into localStorage if none exist, used to populate the chat with demo content on first load.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a Discord-inspired dark theme color palette plus neon and retro theme tokens, custom fonts, border radii, animations, and several plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the full project state (version 39) for a Discord-inspired Global Chat app, including architectural notes, known issues, and a detailed list of existing features such as real-time messaging, AI chatbot, moderation, admin commands, and user authentication.
